# Vendored Ovis-U1 HF Code and Config

This directory vendors code/config/tokenizer files from the Hugging Face repository `AIDC-AI/Ovis-U1-3B`.

- Source repository: https://huggingface.co/AIDC-AI/Ovis-U1-3B
- Source base URL: https://huggingface.co/AIDC-AI/Ovis-U1-3B/resolve/main
- Manifest: [`MANIFEST.json`](./MANIFEST.json)

## Included Files

This directory includes only Python modeling/configuration files and tokenizer/config JSON files needed for the Ovis-U1 ImageWAM baseline. The exact file list is recorded in [`MANIFEST.json`](./MANIFEST.json).

## Excluded Files

Model weights are intentionally excluded from this repository. Users must download weights from the upstream Hugging Face repository according to the upstream terms and access requirements.

## License and Attribution

These vendored files remain subject to the upstream repository license and terms. Before public release, confirm the upstream license metadata on Hugging Face and update this note if a specific license file needs to be copied alongside the vendored files.
